10 extra for car park and room service was terrible food was very poor overpriced and took too long   Proximity to Wembley Arena and comfortable beds

The spa was awful Dirty dated Felt like I needed a wash after leaving the place The rest of the hotel is fine and as you would expect but the spa should either be completely refurbished or shut down as it brings down an othewise nice hotel   Nice room and good location
Been charged for event car parking on the sat when our car was there fri to Monday same as hotel room rate was double for the sat a rip off  Fantastic for Wembley stadium
Unfortunately on event days the prices are hiked up dramatically 250 00 for the night 25 00 to park on site plus 9 99 for breakfast x 2 absolutely scandalous   Great location

Bar prices  We stayed at Holiday Inn Wembley because we were going to an event a the stadium and wanted to be close by We paid a high rate for the room because it was an event day we were very pleased with our room on the 9th floor The view may have been a problem to some people as it over looked the building site next door but there was no noise and we weren t in the room very much The only issue we had was some old UHT milk in with the tea and coffee facilities The staff on reception were very helpful with this issue and agreed to allow us to receive free parking as compensation All in all a very good stay and nice hotel

The room was very dated and the air conditioner did not work also we were unable to open the windows in our room which made for a very uncomfortable evening  Close location to Wembley and was able to book in early

Nothing really no complaints at all about my stay or experience there   Just a perfect experience all around Staff very helpful fast check in and out location amazing I ll be booking there again next time I have an over night stay
The water didn t work in the Sunday and I was told I would get 25 money back but it still hasn t come through after a week  The room was nice and the food was good and the swimming centre was ok

The price of a glass of wine but then again it is London   We were attending a concert at Wembley Arena The hotel is a perfect location as it was a 6 minute walk from our room to Wembley Arena and Wembley Stadium The beds were so very comfortable

My daughters requested a room service breakfast both mornings The first morning it was half an hour late we had to ring room service and remind them The second morning they didn t receive their breakfast as their order form hadn t been taken from the room   The staff were exceptional throughout our stay Very helpful and friendly Food was excellent both at breakfast and evening meal Rooms very clean

Paying 10 to park overnight parking should be free if your staying at the hotel it states on booking com that there is parking but no mention of a cost until you receive your confirmation email   Location helpfulness of the staff cost
Distance from wembley to stanstead airport we checked out a day earlier and booked into holiday express in stanstead to be closer to airport   Food was excellent and service very good
No water at all on the Sunday morning after paying 360 pound to stay for 2 nights i was disgusted to be told it should be sorting in ahour which was no good as we had to set off home

The staff were rude We had no water and was advised we would only get 25 discount We had to call head office to advise we want all our money back and they advised that we would get a cal within 24 hours we have not received a cal

However Sunday morning was a total disaster since the hotel had no water for showers toilets nothing At checkout people were understandably very upset that they had paid a premium price to stay there because of the concert all had children and to have no water became a major issue Some people refused to pay their bills As a IHG priority club member I was instantly offered a 25 discount which I accepted from the nice lady who checked us in the day before Also the car park needs to assign more Disabled parking spots than they currently have   Everything went fine we have a blind daughter and we got an early check in because they were going to a concert at Wembley Stadium from 1500 to 2200 hrs The staff were very helpful and polite and could not do enough for us Our daughter is 14 years old and Blind so getting the room early was first class and allowed us to relax in the bar before going to the Concert I would stay there again since its ideal for Wembley Stadium or Wembley SSI Overall its was fine but the water incident was a major problem see comments below

The hotel is actually 40 minutes away from Heathrow airport although they stated it was only 20 minutes so it cost my friend I 60 each way   Room service was super good staff were friendly and the rooms were very clean beds were comfortable

Couldnt get the room i booked I got a twin beds one instead The personel rushed me to check out Starting at 9 00 I eventually left at 10 00 after the cleaning lady tried entering my room 4 times This is inacceptable
Builders noise disturbed me through the evening and the plug was damaged in the bath which caused a leak below and I got disturbed again   Staff were nice and the food was very good and well priced
Room service was appalling in the sense of taking too long and causing anxiety as going to a concert Had to chase up twice after ordering   Breakfast hot
the pool closes at 10 if it could close at 12 it would be perfect   I loved the staff so polite and welcoming would definitely recommend to a friend and would stay again without a doubt
Despite booing a twin room an emailing to ensure it was a twin room on arrival was given a double bed but staff were quick to deal with the room change   Plenty of choice for breakfast
steep steps into swimming area steam room needs updating Parking for guests overpriced  very friendly and well informed staff too many to pick out an individual
Disappointed with the lack of provision at Breakfast for those with a Gluten intolerance Gluten free bread for toast and Gluten free cereals should be provided
The shower was a bit tired and the mat in the shower could be renewed Other than that no problem at all   The staff were very helpful courteous and the convenience of its location

Would have appreciated more vegetarian menu choices   The beds were extremely comfortable and the staff very friendly and helpful Considering it was the Cup Final weekend they dealt with the fans well they had excellent security

Price was hiked because of the event 189 for one night fair enough I was however slightly annoyed that the car parking charge was also increased from 10 to 25   We went for the FA cup final and the location could not have been better Those of us with family attending the game were also able to watch it on tv in the bar Staff were friendly and the hotel was very comfortable We were also able to book in on arrival at 12 noon albeit in a twin rather than double room

Hotel refused to keep our small travel case whilst we went out They cited SECURITY but we said please look inside at our little case and you can see it is not a bomb Whilst we can fully appreciate the need for high security this was compltetely illogical and caused us a lot of hassle The receptionist had said we could leave our case in the case store when we checked in   Nice clean room and toilet

The Holiday Inn lived up to all the reviews I had read before visiting The room was wonderful the breakfast was super We both enjoyed our stay and will return very very soon   We enjoyed our morning breakfast the hotel was very clean staff very friendly and the surrounding area very nice Lots to see and do in such a short time I give this hotel an 100 rating Big Time
Your website map showed the hotel to be on the Wembley Way it isn t Didn t mind 170 per night but no breakfast included for that amount is very poor

More choices not available in Breakfast buffet   Rapid Action in Check Inn and Check Out My inlaw has misplaced her wedding ring while checking out and but it was found only when we were traveling to Edinburgh on train We contacted Mr Damian through email he responded quickly and indeed they had found the missing ring too Excellent Service you can trust and relay them

I love this hotel as it s in the heart of Wembley and has an amazing shopping outlet on its doorstep The tube station is a 10 minute walk from the hotel with loads of shops along the way The hotel is clean and the rooms look brand new Great T V and the hotel staff are so friendly I will always come back to this hotel

Lack of information about how far from London it was located Coming back after being out for 10 hours to find my used half filled coffee cup sitting there The lack of information There was no concierge and the staff was too young to be helpful with more than checking in and checking out They were polite Having a breakfast buffet every day is too expensive They would be better off cooking for orders   The sheets and towels were clean

Double room yet only one bath robe and one pair of slippers provided The cleaner entered the room in the morning without knocking first with two hours left to checkout time   Great location for Wembley Arena easy parking and very comfortable bed Nice breakfast too

We were at an event at Wembley arrived the night before so had to check out at 11 00 which was understood and OK we paid extra to leave our car in the basement car park 25 00 on top of the 10 00 already paid again understood On our return after the event we expected to use the hotel to freshen up and buy a coffee before we set off on the long journey home after all our car was still in the basement car park extremely low roof take care if your car is tall 5 foot 10 absolute max There was door man on the front door after the event and as we had already checked out spending 311 00 for a one night stay for 2 rooms refused to let us in told we were no longer a guest he was rude and aggressive and told us to use car park exit to go get our car and leave Even showing him the bill and my Holiday Inn frequent stay member card didn t work So don t plan to do what we had planned as it won t work This is one of the worst Holiday Inns I have ever stayed in   Breakfast

2 minor points shower splash shield was loose and wouldnt stay in position allowing water to go all over the floor the complimentary soap sovled that after i wedged it into the gap the only other minor was the plug had to prise it out as the twist mechanism did work but things like that dont bother me and it was a great place to stay  the bed was mighty comfy it makes me want a new bed at home nice aesthetically pleasing decor

The water dripping constantly outside the entrance to Room 1007 Not related to the hotel but when we called for an early morning pick up to Victoria Green line Coach station to catch a tour to Cotswolds on 14th May 2017 the driver didn t know the location neither did he have a GPS tracker with him He fished out a physical map and magnifying glass to locate it Ultimately reached our destination only because we had our GPS on Almost missed our expensive prepaid tour   Good breakfast Liked the Cumberland sausages a lot The Fish and chips we had at the restaurant bar for dinner over two nights was extremely delicious The grilled salmon with noodles a second best Convenient location to catch buses to Wembley Central or Wembley Park station and Brent cross Convenience of summoning cab service from hotel foyer dedicated phone
Expensive breakfast Car parking was expensive as there was an event on at Wembley stadium  The location was excellent beds comfortable showers were great Designer outlet was just a minutes walk away
No complaints   We were there for to watch footie at Wembley so location was faultless Hotel itself was clean and very comfortable with everything you needed Wanted to take the bed home with us
Pristine clean comfortable rooms well decorated superior linen and walls thick enough that you don t hear anything Great black out curtains Hotel has a pool too And nice bar area

Dont think its acceptable to charge guests 25 pounds parking instead of the usual 10 pounds event day or otherwise 10 pounds per person for breakfast is also too much Not happy when the room costs are high anyway

No proper front desk staff was confused they gave the booked room to someone else and I have to shifted to nearby hotel they arranged for 1st night I was very tired after long air journey and I booked taxi to reach fast hotel to have rest But was shocked that no room in the hotel when it was booked from 3 pm onwards for me Next morning I came to holiday inn kept my baggage there and left for my work Night when I returned got the room later on it was just ok upto 13th morning I checked out The only answer from hotel staff was they apologize and say sorry but this is not the answer to deal with a pre booking  Breakfast
Food was rather pricey and staff were a little unhelpful  Room was very clean as was the bathroom Pool Sauna and Steam Room were great and open for the majority of the time
a huge minus for the bad cleaning even though we put up the please Clean our room   perfect when attending events at Wembley arena or stadium Nice staff

Booked the Executive Suite and got no 1034 I believe but the bedroom was literaly NEXT to the 3 elevator shafts which you could hear very clearly so I rebooked it the other suite was booked already and got the Executive no 1017 Didn t slept half of the night because of some ennoying buzzing sound I told the reception and I had to wait about an hour for the maintenance guy to check it out Whether it was the vent at the bathroom which they could not put off But I said this is not the sound which kept me awake So he came listened and said this isn t the bathroom vent but the equipment just above my room on the roof aircooler etc Then after a few minutes another maintenance person came and told me he had shut off the bathroom vent but you still could hear the buzzing he said Oh I could hear it when I came into the hall way He said well the whole roof is full of vents etc and he adviced to sleep one floor down They offered me a room 912 and I checked it out no buzzing sound So I agreed and I asked the reception girl okay I assume I get a refund because I payed for the executive At first she acted like she didn t understand me this is a twin room I said I understand but I payed for an executive and this is a standard room isn t it Finally she said we cannot give you a refund So I asked for the manager Her alternative was keeping me at the 10th floor as I paid for it and in this case 1015 en 1020 I waited on her she wanted to check it out for herself and gave me a cappucino She said don t hurry take your time So when I finished my cappucino I went to the reception And then the manager said oh well 1020 is already booked we are busy I said it has no use to relocate 1 room away but still she insisted to one of the staff going with me to check it out But what I thought the same sound obviously it was also noticable there   The reception staff restaurant staff concierge is very helpfull

Not a lot cannot say I could grumble about anything it would have to be something very picky to grumble   The breakfast was very good even though we got down there at just before 11 they still accommodated us and our friends didn t get down till after 11 and still managed to get breakfast The bed was so soft with firm pillows made for a perfect nights sleep and the location was perfect we managed to go to the London designer outlet and have a browse and when I noticed my shirt was dirty it took me about a 2 minute walk to get to it to buy myself a new one All in all the hotel was very good The pool is brilliant very big nice Jacuzzi and staff are very helpful Very good value for money In addition the tube and train station are only a short walk away meaning our night out in London was very accessible and when it came to going home we were right next to the station
Good value for London and reasonably fast to get to Central London via Tube which isn t near but isn t far away either Restaurant had really excellent Indian dishes

I do think for the cost of the room breakfast should have been included We did buy vouchers for breakfast   We were going to an event in the SSE arena in Wembley so it was great to be so close The room was comfortable and clean The staff were helpful and the breakfast was really good

Wasn t sure of the cost of parking keep in mind I was charged 25 usually 20 on non event days   Booked months early for the Joshua v Klitschko fight so got a twin room at a good deal Location is literally a 30 second walk from Wembley stadium lots of parking available below the hotel charge was 25 on the event day and a bar open until late next to the reception Hotel security were on the door too only allowing guests in which is helpful around midnight Room was large and comfy with a decent enough sized TV for a night or two and the bathroom was clean

Over zealous security Made me throw away a Diet Coke at the front door and would not allow me to enter hotel with it They should have been concerned about all the drunks loitering in their parking lot instead of a guest with a soft drink  Location

Easy to find hotel right next to Wembley Wembley central underground is around a 10 minute walk It takes around 25 minutes to get to from the city using the bakeroo line which runs through most major stops in the city We done the Harry Potter Studio tour and went from Wembley central to Watford Juncton in around 25 minutes

I had better breakfasts especially the quality of the coffee at breakfast was relatively poor at the bar it was lovely temperature at the breakfast room was a bit low windows were single glass  location

the black lady staff in the swimming pool is worse no manners and one of my friend saw her that she wipes the holiday inn towel in the floor at the toilet so disgusting and specially our toilet when we first come inside the room is so istick  food is excellent

The room was very clean the location of theI hotel is great the station is 5 minutes away the designer outlet is very close from the hotel I enjoyed my stay there

Noisy teenagers football training sat in corridor making a lot of noise Big concern about room cleaning My cups weren t washed one still had tea in it from previous day On arrival I noticed the hand towel had an unpleasant stain and a hole so I left it in the bath it wasn t replaced and should not have been in a room to start with This is NOT a 4 hotel   The location was convenient for my business trip
When asked about the pool we were told it was open all day When we went down the next morning it was shut for 2 hours meaning we weren t able to swim because of our train time
The only complaint we had was the mirror in our room was dusty and full of fingermarks and was never cleaned in the whole of the 3 days we were there   The breakfast and service were excellent
I couldn t fault the hotel at all  It was perfect the bed was comfy the room was clean and the breakfast was delicious I would highly recommend and would book again

Probably the parking cost when an event on all parking costs the same  All the local restaurants on the doorstep along the outlet shoping Breakfast was great Checked In early at11am as room was ready Nice receptionist Couldn t fault it will go again as this is our second time

When we arrived at 21 20 when asked if the kitchen was still open the staffed advised that it was closed hearing that we decided to use the pool facilities we then went out to look for something to eat we got back tk the hotel around 23 00 we then asked one of the bar staff what time the kitchen was closed as we saw other customers still eating in the dining area we where told 22 30 if this information was known by the staff on the front desk we wouldn t have to travel outside the hotel to find food as we had travelled for 4hrs to get there and was very tired this was very disappointing   I liked the hotel has 24hr access I also liked that it has pool sauna facilities

Beds were uncomfortable Not sure if that was because it was a double bed and we are used to a memory foam king size   Location was excellent for Wembley stadium

most of the bar and restaurant staff could have been more helpful and friendly i sat in the restaurant for 15 minutes before another guest informed me it was a help yourself menu although saying that it was good value   the facilities were good and the beds were comfortable the reception staff were friendly There were rips in the bed which didnt look good

Nothing to report on this question   Very helpful concierge lovely breakfast lots of choice Own parking a real plus Excellent designer outlets just a short walk away and on the doorstep of Wembley Stadium

The lifts considering there were three at times took awhile to get to the floor when waiting The shortage of staff at reception when checking out   The ease of getting to Wembley Arena The breakfast was great Friendly and courteous bar staff even under pressure during the late evening rush
Can t think of anything  Room was lovely also very clean Staff are very friendly We had breakfast and dinner and food was brilliant We were going to the arena so the location was perfect

The spa needs updating but it was clean and function able   Very enjoyable friendly welcoming staff and fabulous breakfast rooms very comfy and well appointed thanks for a great stay

Could do with a little more tea coffee milk but everything else excellent   Staff breakfast cleanliness of rooms beds location to Wembley Arena Stadium all excellent room could have been a little larger

We booked a queen room but it was 2 single mattress pushed together very poor Asked the manager about it he said they are all like that but changed rooms for us another staff member said it is not normal for a bed like that Think someone was telling lies

I stayed at the Holiday Inn Wembley from 16 2 for three nights I am very disappointed with the quality of my stay Upon arrival I asked the receptionist for a quiet room as on the last night I would have to get up at 2 30 and needed to sleep She said that she didn t know if the room was quiet and that in any case it had already been allocated Upon entering my room I noticed it smelled stale so did my bed but decided against talking to the receptionists about it as they had not been very helpful before As I got into bed that night I felt itchy the same happened on the two consecutive nights While staying at your hotel I developed a rash that did not allow me to rest comfortably The rash on my body appeared on both legs torso and arms where my body was in contact with the sheets mattress I mentioned all of this as I checked out and the male receptionist said he would make a note of this I also asked for a wake up call at 2 30 am but I didn t get one I sent two emails to complain with pictures of the rash attached but haven t received an acknowledgement or reply yet

We loved everything about our trip   Everything about the hotel was fabulous The room was lovely with a fabulous king size bed Clean towels and room tidied daily Breakfast s are brilliant with a great selection and the meal we had in the restaurant one evening was lovely We had a great week in London and the nice weather was a bonus Will definitely stay again Lovely helpful staff who are a credit to your company Many thanks

The noise early in the morning was disappointing A lot of banging doors and I could hear housekeeping   The best was so comfy and the staff were really helpful The location was great Just a 20 minute tube ride from Baker Street

No breakfast included There was a used coffee cup and spoon in the room when we arrived Found the aircon a bit difficult to regulate the room temp effectively Unit was also a little noisy to leave on overnight   Room size shower ability to leave car in car park beyond check out time

It is not 7 mins away from the city center like it is claimed on booking com is definately incorrect Its around 25 mins to the city center  Nice area close to outlet store Wembley stadium and bus stops metro stations

The swimming pool was on the small side and is looking old The steam was could do with refurbishing The Sauna was too small and look like a joke   The bed was comfortable The staff were friendly and helpful Lovely shower it was great

Swimming pool area and changing rooms filthy appalling service in restaurant mediocre food and beds like trampolines to sleep on Certainly not a 4 star hotel and Holiday Inn Expresses are better and much cheaper   Not much

The construction site outside I know this can t be helped but didn t have to set a alarm clock  The room was very clean and lush tidy bed shower with a big head on perfect

Poor wifi Sometimes we didn t have connection to internet It was really Low speed And there was no air conditioner in the room Rooms facing the street were noisy at nights We ask the reception to change our room with an apposite sites room and they kindly changed our room  It was a good hotel with nice and helpful staff and spacious room Breakfast was good Good access to public transportation And only some minutes walking to Duna river

The bedroom and bathroom were very clean and spacious Larger than the average UK chain hotel There was a mini bar which kept some of our supplies cool If you stay more than one night there is an option not to have the room cleaned and to claim a free drink each at the bar instead There was a lovely terrace and grassed outdoor seating area in which to have said drink Almost opposite was a Billa supermarket which was well presented and had a lovely choice of food and drink An Aldi was also located about 100 metres in the opposite direction The location was also just a few minutes walk from the underground station and also convenient for the Danube waterfront The hotel room brochure recommended a place to eat which although we were dubious about trying was really good It was about a 20 minute walk but worth it for a very authentic pub bar with reasonably priced food and the option for eating inside or out

Very expensive parking There was a fan but no air conditioning which made the room quite hot as we had 30 degrees weather Otherwise no issues   Nice staff big room good breakfast good location near metro and river

Unfortunately it was disapointment about serviss 1st girl at recepti on when we arrived 1 hour before cheking time seemed really exausted didn t look at clients didn t smile later after cheking in our time we called reception to ask to get soap as soap bottle in the toilet room was empty but we didn t get it when we checked out we had to wait a long time another girl from serviss helped to find reception girl who didn t even appologize and after cheking that our bill is paid ai everithing is fine with out saying goodbuy or smth like that A real disapointment for 4 star hotel   It s nice to have possibilitie to place car in garage for aditional cost the room was clean
Garage is for additional charge but it was Sunday so we parked on the street for free So it wasn t the problem for us   Very clean suite close enough to metro

It s just minor and can be overlooked if booking I would prefer wider range at breakfast What I would definitely change serving scrambled eggs in little glass jars That was somewhat strange felt like from some kind of laboratory If ordering omelette there was a note about extra charge so I did not try but boiled eggs were awailable on request boiled to your requirements   24 hour reception helpful professional personell in both reception and restaurant Although not in immediate centre the holtel is only a few metro stops away from main points of interest centre railway stations ets Few minutes walk from the metro station Great size room my room even facing the street was still quiet comfortable beds At the time of booking good value for money Ideal for solo travellers and business fine for families and couples if no romantic perks are required If needed supermarket is just opposite the hotel Acceptable breakfast if included in room rate When in Vienna again I ll definitely check this hotel for availability

Unfortunately there s no kettle or tea coffee making facilities in room It would be a great boon if hotel could provide one in each room Otherwise no complaints   Warm welcome at reception they even let us check in early which was very handy Clean and spacious room with everything we needed including fridge and hairdryer Spare pillow provided Breakfast was filling and healthy wide selection of bread and warm rolls Supermarket opposite and 5 minutes away from metro station Vorgartenstrasse about 15 minutes to the centre We d certainly go back there again

I miss having coffee and tea making facilities in the room This may be an Austrian thing though   The staff were friendly and helpful The decor and cleanliness were excellent There was an excellent selection for breakfast Soft boiled eggs are available to order There are a few extras which have to be paid for Ham and eggs omelette etc

Comfortable beds spacious rooms and bathroom Variety of choices for breakfast Our room was quite airy though we did not notice an existing air conditioning We stayed mid of springtime staying during summer could be a bit different though if our observation is true For those not favoring the walking to the center 30min 3km there is a metro station nearby
a bit old fahisoned room  not at the city center but fair enough to reach breakfast is vey well big room bathroom comfortable bed very friendly staff close to public transport

Breakfast was OK but I feel that there is definitely space for improvement Maybe introduce some more variety What I found especially annoying was that the glasses that I got for breakfast were the size of my thumb I guess 1 dl so I had to get up several times to refill   The room and bathroom were large and clean especially the bathroom Wi fi worked great staff was helpful and in general I didn t have any complaints during my stay At the moment that I booked this hotel I couldn t find anything even close to this quality for the money The hotel is located very conveniently near to the airport train city center and Vienna international center It is also very close to Prater amusement park Donauinsel and Saint Francis of Assisi church

The location is not bad but not really good either while easily reachable still a while from the centre and somewhat outskirtish The room could do with some more utensils in particulare shoe polish shoe horn Their policy of charging 12 euro a night for a pet without even offering any service for that money is outdated these days   The room was overall clean except for the shower head which was covered in limescale and spacious enough Wifi worked fine

Not enough light in the room lack of restaurant for dinner or at least for having a light meal at night  I like the connection WI FI automatic the room clean breakfast good desk for working with my computer

Everything was fine It was a short stay and not many things can happen but all in all it was a good stay If you are staying there over the weekend the parking outside is free ignore what it says on the site Good connection to the underground Friendly staff It was great value for money but I have to emphasise we god a very good one day deal on booking com

The hotel is very cosy and clean rooms bright and spacious Breakfast was fine tasty bread and rolls Thanks to the friendly staff we could check in earlier the hotel is next to the metro station and supermarket I would strongly recommend staying in Austria Trend Hotel Lassalle Wien

Room location facing an inner pier   I was in Barcelona for a convention and booked a regular room through booking com 7 nights Euro 220 per night without breakfast for one person and my tiny room faced an inner pier No window facing the outside world not possibility to know what the weather is like or see anything that is going on outside No way to open the curtains as the see through elevator was going down next to my room and there were other windows facing mine on all sides I think that a 4 star hotel must have all rooms facing the outside and if the room is not this needs to be written in the room description I thought Euro 220 per night without breakfast were enough and did not take the superior room which was an additional Euro 50 60 per night When I saw that my room is facing a pier I asked to change the room but they said they were fully booked I want to stress that the hotel is beautiful has a good location the room was clean and nice the bathroom big and comfortable there was a Nespresso coffee machine and 2 water bottles every day complementary from the hotel But in hindsight I personally would not have chosen this hotel with this view I find that depressing Sorry And the hotel MUST say in the room description that it faces an inner pier Period

Walls between rooms are really thin you can hear everything what is going on in the neighboring rooms We were lucky to have quiet neighbors   We had wonderful terrace facing courtyard so it was were calm and quiet in the room Breakfasts were great very tasty and friendly serviced A lot of restaurants bars shops next to hotel 10 minutes walking to main streets

Front desk staff made minimal effort to welcome us Seemed uninformed Gave poor directions no suggestions No material in lobby or room for tourists Only H10 hotel advertising Big issue when we arrived after traveling over 15 hours from Los Angeles minimal effort was made to welcome us It was 10 30 pm no one else in lobby When given a room I specifically asked is this a nice room Oh yes was the response The room was likely the worst room in the hotel An airless dark box at the bottom of the hotel next to an elevator shaft No outside window It was awful it was late and it was inexcusable Given another room which was fine with a small terrace Why wasn t that offered initially Did the front desk person just think we were completely irrelevant Bad way to start a trip in such a wonderful city Rest of front desk staff metely adequate We were there 4 nights Would not recommend this hotel based upon front desk reception  Cleanliness location Expresso Keurig in room
